workshoptitle: How-To: LiveLabs AI Playground for Authors

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Overview of the LiveLabs AI Playground workshop for agentic authoring workflows that help LiveLabs authors work faster while preserving quality and teaching flow.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Take Screenshots in Minutes
tutorials.description: Learn how to use an agentic screenshot workflow to walk a lab, capture screenshots, annotate images, blur sensitive information, and keep workshop assets aligned with placeholder references.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Generate Quizzes in Minutes
tutorials.description: Learn how to add quiz-based knowledge checks with an agentic workflow that preserves the teaching content and validates the result.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Convert Workshops by Industry in Minutes
tutorials.description: Learn how to create an industry-specific workshop variant, preserve source fidelity, and review the output for drift or duplication.
